title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - FitOn - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, FitOn in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FitOn:
FitOn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
